document.title: NOVA Master Calculation Logic v2
document.purpose: Master JSON calculation logic for NOVA to compute S0–S9 codes, normalize outputs, call the correct content databases, and render report sections safely.

positioning.safe_language_note: All interpretations are symbolic and reflective. They are not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious instructions, and they do not define a fixed identity.

validation_rules: birth_year must be a four-digit integer.
birth_day must be valid for the given month and year.
NOVA should reject impossible dates before calculation.
NOVA should not ask for birth time; birth time is not used in the 1320 system.
normalization_rules: Use numeric month and day values, without leading-zero influence in arithmetic.
For full_birth_date_digit_sum, sum all digits from YYYY, MM, and DD. Month/day leading zeros do not change the digit sum except by contributing 0.

digit_sum.definition: Sum all decimal digits in an integer or date component string.

full_birth_date_digit_sum.definition: Sum all digits across birth_year, birth_month, and birth_day.

mod.definition: Use standard modulo operation. Apply each module's zero_rule after modulo calculation.

vibration_level.definition: Map S3_raw to official S3 vibration level using the official S3 vibration mapping table.
vibration_level.implementation_note: NOVA must not infer S3 level without the official mapping table. If the table is missing, return S3_raw and a missing_mapping error instead of guessing.

S1.name: Soul Origin
S1.zero_rule: Not applicable under normal four-digit birth_year calculation.

S2.name: Soul Mirror
S2.range: 2-43 for valid Gregorian birth dates; legacy database may support wider range if needed.

S3.name: Soul Vibration
S3.range: Defined by official S3 vibration mapping table.

missing_mapping_behavior.message: Official S3 vibration mapping table is required. NOVA must not guess S3.

S0.name: Void Gate
S0.zero_rule: Keep 0 as S0-00. Do not convert to 20.

S4.name: Core Shadow Pattern
S4.zero_rule: Keep 0 as S4-00. Do not convert to 20.

S5.name: Soul Mission
S5.zero_rule: If modulo result is 0, convert to 44.
rendering_blocks: What Your Soul Is Learning to Express
S5.rendering_rule: NOVA must retrieve the prewritten S5 content from the content database. NOVA must not generate the core seven blocks from scratch.

S6.name: Value & Receiving
S6.zero_rule: If modulo result is 0, convert to 44.
rendering_blocks: What Your Soul Is Learning to Receive
S6.rendering_rule: NOVA must translate old money-frequency meanings into Value & Receiving language. Do not output financial predictions, income promises, investment advice, or wealth destiny statements.

S7.name: Soul Sovereignty
S7.zero_rule: Keep 0 as S7-00. Do not convert.

S8.name: Soul Contribution
S8.zero_rule: Keep 0 as S8-00. Do not convert.

S9.name: Return to Source
S9.zero_rule: Keep 0 as S9-00. Do not convert.

code_formatting_rules.padding: All user-visible module codes should use two-digit padding after the dash, e.g. S5-09, S7-03, S0-00.
code_formatting_rules.internal_numeric_values: Store both numeric_value and code_string in output JSON.

free_report.name: Free Detailed Report
free_report.purpose: Awareness Layer: see foundational patterns clearly.

full_report.name: Full Soul Reflection Report
full_report.purpose: Awareness + Transformation: understand how patterns become mission, value, and sovereign action.

advanced_report.name: Advanced Integration Report
advanced_report.purpose: Full S0–S9 integration: contribution and return-to-source reflection.

worked_example.note: This example assumes the official S3 vibration mapping returns S3 = 8 for S3_raw = 110.

must_do: Use the official S3 mapping table.
Use content database lookup for all module interpretations.
Preserve user agency and avoid authority positioning.
Add safe language notes in report output.
must_not_do: Do not infer S3 without the official mapping table.
Do not call S6 Money Frequency in user-visible output.
Do not generate S5 or S6 core blocks from scratch when database content exists.
Do not present any result as destiny, fate, fixed identity, diagnosis, prophecy, or guarantee.
Do not rank S8–S9 as higher spiritual levels.
allowed_contextual_generation: Brief integration summary based on already calculated and retrieved module content.
Grounded reflection questions and practices, if aligned with content database safety rules.

v1_to_v2.old: Four-part system using S1, S3, S2, S0 as primary public structure.
v1_to_v2.new: Ten-layer S0–S9 system grouped into Awareness, Transformation, and Integration.

v1_to_v2.old: S5 as a generated mission report using S1/S2/S3/S0.
v1_to_v2.new: S5 as independently calculated code using (S1 + S2 + S3) mod 44; legacy structure may inform report assembly only.
Full Report = S0–S7, including Soul Mission, Value & Receiving, and Soul Sovereignty.
S8 Soul Contribution and S9 Return to Source form the Advanced Integration Layer.
